README.NewAge Products — Mock Drayage Invoice D: Synthetic data for the Inbound Freight Manager assignment demo.
1. The PDF version of each invoice is in the sample_invoices/ folder. Use them for the batch-upload demo moment.
2. AI extractor should parse each PDF into one structured invoice record (header + lines).
3. After parsing, the audit engine runs across the full set and surfaces the 10 planted findings on the dashboard.
4. Live container tracker call: pick any container number from the Invoices sheet and call ShipsGo / Terminal49 / Searates.
5. The Audit_Findings_Key sheet is the ground truth — every finding listed there must fire in the demo.

Audit_Findings_Key.What's Wrong: Linehaul charged $625; rate card RC-WC-005 (LA Pier 300 → Perris) is $535. Delta $90.
Audit_Findings_Key.Expected Tool Behavior: Flag MEDIUM. Recommend dispute. Pre-fill MSA §4.1 rate-variance clause.

Audit_Findings_Key.What's Wrong: FSC stated as 22% but charged $134.46 on $495 base. 22% of $495 = $108.90. Delta $25.56.
Audit_Findings_Key.Expected Tool Behavior: Recalc and flag delta. Dispute the difference. Show compute method in email.

Audit_Findings_Key.What's Wrong: Accessorial total $750 vs base $545 = 137% of base. Five accessorials on one FB#.
Audit_Findings_Key.Expected Tool Behavior: Flag HIGH. Require IFM review. Pull container milestones to justify or dispute each line.

Audit_Findings_Key.What's Wrong: Chassis Usage (3 days) appears twice on the same FB#.
Audit_Findings_Key.Expected Tool Behavior: Flag CRITICAL. Hold payment on this line. Auto-include in dispute.

Audit_Findings_Key.What's Wrong: Container not linked to any PO in the POs sheet.
Audit_Findings_Key.Expected Tool Behavior: Flag HIGH. Block invoice approval until linked. Notify Demand Planning.

Audit_Findings_Key.What's Wrong: Container picked up 2 days after LFD. Port demurrage $375 charged.
Audit_Findings_Key.Expected Tool Behavior: Flag CRITICAL. Compute exposure × per-diem. Recommend dispatch reorder.

Audit_Findings_Key.What's Wrong: 3 hours of consignee detention billed; 2 hours are free per MSA. Should be 1 hr × $95.
Audit_Findings_Key.Expected Tool Behavior: Flag for IFM review. Auto-compute correct hours. Open dispute for $190.

Audit_Findings_Key.What's Wrong: 2 hours of terminal waiting; 1 hour free per MSA. Should be 1 hr × $95.
Audit_Findings_Key.Expected Tool Behavior: Flag LOW. Auto-correct to 1 hour. Open dispute for $95.

Audit_Findings_Key.What's Wrong: PNW lane charged $825 vs rate card RC-PNW-001 (Tacoma → Auburn) is $735. Delta $90.
Audit_Findings_Key.Expected Tool Behavior: Flag MEDIUM. Recommend dispute against CDS. Same rule, different carrier.

Audit_Findings_Key.What's Wrong: TONU charged but no documented dispatch instance in our log. Disputable without proof.
Audit_Findings_Key.Expected Tool Behavior: Flag MEDIUM. Request carrier's dispatch log. Open conditional dispute.
